name: LSTM Layer
description: Long Short-Term Memory layer with forget, input, output gates
code:
_ls{{_id}}_id = {{input_dim}}
_ls{{_id}}_hd = {{hidden_dim}}
_ls{{_id}}_wi = np.random.randn(4 * _ls{{_id}}_hd, _ls{{_id}}_id).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_ls{{_id}}_wh = np.random.randn(4 * _ls{{_id}}_hd, _ls{{_id}}_hd).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_ls{{_id}}_b = np.zeros(4 * _ls{{_id}}_hd, dtype=np.float32)
_ls{{_id}}_bs, _ls{{_id}}_sl, _ = {{input}}.shape
_ls{{_id}}_h = np.zeros((_ls{{_id}}_bs, _ls{{_id}}_hd), dtype=np.float32)
_ls{{_id}}_c = np.zeros((_ls{{_id}}_bs, _ls{{_id}}_hd), dtype=np.float32)
_ls{{_id}}_outs = []
for _ls{{_id}}_t in range(_ls{{_id}}_sl):
    _ls{{_id}}_xt = {{input}}[:, _ls{{_id}}_t, :]
    _ls{{_id}}_gates = np.matmul(_ls{{_id}}_xt, _ls{{_id}}_wi.T) + np.matmul(_ls{{_id}}_h, _ls{{_id}}_wh.T) + _ls{{_id}}_b
    _ls{{_id}}_i = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_ls{{_id}}_gates[:, :_ls{{_id}}_hd]))
    _ls{{_id}}_f = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_ls{{_id}}_gates[:, _ls{{_id}}_hd:2*_ls{{_id}}_hd]))
    _ls{{_id}}_g = np.tanh(_ls{{_id}}_gates[:, 2*_ls{{_id}}_hd:3*_ls{{_id}}_hd])
    _ls{{_id}}_o = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_ls{{_id}}_gates[:, 3*_ls{{_id}}_hd:]))
    _ls{{_id}}_c = _ls{{_id}}_f * _ls{{_id}}_c + _ls{{_id}}_i * _ls{{_id}}_g
    _ls{{_id}}_h = _ls{{_id}}_o * np.tanh(_ls{{_id}}_c)
    _ls{{_id}}_outs.append(_ls{{_id}}_h)
{{output}} = np.stack(_ls{{_id}}_outs, axis=1)
{{hidden}} = _ls{{_id}}_h
